phrases.summary: The text states that Abraham is the one who fathered/brought forth Isaac, identifying Abraham’s role as the parent of Isaac.
The text says that Isaac is the parent who fathered/brought forth Jacob, describing Isaac’s role in the lineage.

phrases.phrase: Ἰακὼβ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἰούδαν καὶ τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς αὐτοῦ,
phrases.translation: Jacob begot Judah and his brothers.
phrases.summary: The text indicates that Jacob fathered both Judah and Jacob’s other brothers, presenting Jacob as the origin of these offspring.
